Index: /Users/zengx/.workbuddy/wb-sync.sh
===================================================================
--- /Users/zengx/.workbuddy/wb-sync.sh
+++ /Users/zengx/.workbuddy/wb-sync.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,278 @@
+#!/bin/zsh
+# WorkBuddy 跨设备同步脚本
+# 用法: wb-sync [init|push|pull|status]
+#
+# 首次使用:
+#   1. 在 GitHub 上创建一个私有仓库（比如 workbuddy-sync）
+#   2. 修改下面的 REMOTE_URL
+#   3. 运行: wb-sync init
+#   4. 在另一台电脑上: wb-sync pull
+#
+# 日常使用:
+#   离开当前电脑时: wb-sync push
+#   到达另一台电脑时: wb-sync pull
+
+# ====== 配置（必填）======
+REMOTE_URL="${WORKBUDDY_SYNC_REPO:-git@github.com:zengx/WorkBuddy.git}"
+BRANCH="main"
+# ==========================
+
+# 颜色
+RED='\033[0;31m'
+GREEN='\033[0;32m'
+YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+BLUE='\033[0;34m'
+NC='\033[0m'
+
+WORKBUDDY_DIR="$HOME/.workbuddy"
+
+# 检查 workbuddy 目录
+if [ ! -d "$WORKBUDDY_DIR" ]; then
+    echo "${RED}❌ 找不到 $WORKBUDDY_DIR${NC}"
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+cd "$WORKBUDDY_DIR" || exit 1
+
+# 创建 .gitignore
+ensure_gitignore() {
+    if [ -f .gitignore ]; then
+        return
+    fi
+    echo "${BLUE}创建 .gitignore...${NC}"
+    cat > .gitignore << 'EOF'
+# 运行时临时文件
+logs/
+traces/
+shell-snapshots/
+*.db-wal
+*.db-shm
+.DS_Store
+*.tmp
+*.log
+
+# 应用自身（不需要同步）
+app/
+binaries/
+
+# 市场缓存
+connectors-marketplace/
+plugin-marketplace-state-new
+.plugin-stats-cache.json
+.connectors-marketplace.meta.json
+
+# 启动相关
+install-timing-reported
+tencent-docs-engine.port
+last-launch.json
+EOF
+}
+
+# 初始化 git
+ensure_git_repo() {
+    if [ -d .git ]; then
+        return
+    fi
+
+    echo "${YELLOW}首次使用，初始化 git 仓库...${NC}"
+    git init -q
+    git branch -M "$BRANCH"
+    ensure_gitignore
+
+    if ! git remote get-url origin &>/dev/null; then
+        if [[ "$REMOTE_URL" == *"YOUR_USERNAME"* ]]; then
+            echo "${RED}❌ 请先修改脚本顶部的 REMOTE_URL，填入你的 GitHub 仓库地址${NC}"
+            echo "   或者设置环境变量: export WORKBUDDY_SYNC_REPO=git@github.com:xxx/yyy.git"
+            exit 1
+        fi
+        git remote add origin "$REMOTE_URL"
+        echo "${GREEN}已关联远程仓库: $REMOTE_URL${NC}"
+    fi
+}
+
+# 询问 WorkBuddy 是否已关闭
+confirm_close_workbuddy() {
+    # 非交互模式（被 launchd 等调用）直接通过
+    if [[ ! -t 0 ]] || [[ "$WB_SYNC_AUTO" == "1" ]]; then
+        return 0
+    fi
+    echo "${YELLOW}⚠️  请确认 WorkBuddy 已完全退出（不是最小化窗口）${NC}"
+    read -p "WorkBuddy 退出了吗？[y/N] " -n 1 -r
+    echo
+    if [[ ! $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
+        echo "${RED}请先退出 WorkBuddy（macOS: Cmd+Q，Windows: 文件→退出），再重试${NC}"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+}
+
+# 检查是否有 WorkBuddy 进程在运行
+check_workbuddy_running() {
+    if pgrep -f "WorkBuddy" &>/dev/null || pgrep -f "workbuddy" &>/dev/null; then
+        echo "${RED}❌ 检测到 WorkBuddy 还在运行${NC}"
+        echo "   请先完全退出 WorkBuddy，再执行同步"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+}
+
+# 询问路径差异处理
+handle_path_diff() {
+    echo "${BLUE}💡 提示: 如果两台电脑的 macOS 用户名不同，${NC}"
+    echo "${BLUE}   同步完成后可能需要在 WorkBuddy 里重新指定工作目录${NC}"
+    echo "${BLUE}   路径差异在 .workbuddy/projects/ 下的子目录名中${NC}"
+}
+
+# ====== 子命令 ======
+
+action_init() {
+    ensure_git_repo
+    ensure_gitignore
+
+    if git rev-parse --verify HEAD &>/dev/null && [ -n "$(git log --oneline 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
+        echo "${YELLOW}已经初始化过了${NC}"
+        git status -s
+        return
+    fi
+
+    check_workbuddy_running
+
+    echo "${BLUE}添加文件并首次提交...${NC}"
+    git add -A
+    if git diff --cached --quiet; then
+        echo "${YELLOW}没有可同步的内容（目录是空的）${NC}"
+        return
+    fi
+
+    git commit -q -m "initial sync from $(hostname) at $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
+    git push -u origin "$BRANCH"
+    echo "${GREEN}✅ 初始化完成！${NC}"
+    echo "${BLUE}在另一台电脑上执行: wb-sync pull${NC}"
+}
+
+action_push() {
+    ensure_git_repo
+
+    check_workbuddy_running
+    confirm_close_workbuddy
+
+    git add -A
+    if git diff --cached --quiet; then
+        echo "${YELLOW}没有新内容需要同步${NC}"
+        return
+    fi
+
+    git commit -q -m "sync from $(hostname) at $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
+
+    if ! git push origin "$BRANCH" 2>&1 | tee /tmp/wb-sync-push.log; then
+        echo "${RED}❌ 推送失败${NC}"
+        if grep -q "non-fast-forward" /tmp/wb-sync-push.log; then
+            echo "${YELLOW}提示: 远程有新提交。先 pull 一下：wb-sync pull --force-overwrite${NC}"
+        fi
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    echo "${GREEN}✅ 推送完成${NC}"
+}
+
+action_pull() {
+    ensure_git_repo
+
+    check_workbuddy_running
+
+    # 备份本地配置
+    BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/.workbuddy.backup.$(date '+%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')"
+    echo "${BLUE}📦 备份本地配置到 $BACKUP_DIR${NC}"
+    mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
+    cp -R "$WORKBUDDY_DIR"/. "$BACKUP_DIR"/ 2>/dev/null
+
+    git fetch origin
+
+    # 检查本地是否有未推送的提交
+    LOCAL_AHEAD=$(git rev-list --count origin/"$BRANCH"..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
+    if [ "$LOCAL_AHEAD" -gt 0 ]; then
+        echo "${YELLOW}⚠️  本地有 $LOCAL_AHEAD 个未推送的提交${NC}"
+        echo "请选择:"
+        echo "  1) 先 push（推荐）→  wb-sync push"
+        echo "  2) 放弃本地更改，用远程覆盖 →  wb-sync pull --force-overwrite"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    # 拉取
+    if ! git pull --rebase origin "$BRANCH" 2>&1; then
+        echo "${YELLOW}rebase 失败，尝试普通 merge...${NC}"
+        git pull origin "$BRANCH" || {
+            echo "${RED}❌ 拉取失败，可能有冲突。请检查后手动处理${NC}"
+            exit 1
+        }
+    fi
+
+    echo "${GREEN}✅ 拉取完成${NC}"
+    handle_path_diff
+    echo "${BLUE}现在可以打开 WorkBuddy 了${NC}"
+}
+
+action_force_pull() {
+    ensure_git_repo
+    check_workbuddy_running
+
+    BACKUP_DIR="$HOME/.workbuddy.backup.$(date '+%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')"
+    echo "${BLUE}📦 备份到 $BACKUP_DIR${NC}"
+    mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
+    cp -R "$WORKBUDDY_DIR"/. "$BACKUP_DIR"/ 2>/dev/null
+
+    echo "${YELLOW}强制重置到远程版本...${NC}"
+    git fetch origin
+    git reset --hard origin/"$BRANCH"
+
+    echo "${GREEN}✅ 完成${NC}"
+    handle_path_diff
+}
+
+action_status() {
+    if [ ! -d .git ]; then
+        echo "${YELLOW}还没初始化。运行: wb-sync init${NC}"
+        return
+    fi
+
+    echo "${BLUE}=== 仓库信息 ===${NC}"
+    echo "远程: $(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo '未配置')"
+    echo "分支: $BRANCH"
+    echo ""
+    echo "${BLUE}=== 状态 ===${NC}"
+    git status
+    echo ""
+    echo "${BLUE}=== 同步状态 ===${NC}"
+    LOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)
+    REMOTE=$(git rev-parse origin/"$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null)
+    if [ "$LOCAL" = "$REMOTE" ]; then
+        echo "${GREEN}✅ 本地与远程一致${NC}"
+    else
+        AHEAD=$(git rev-list --count origin/"$BRANCH"..HEAD 2>/dev/null)
+        BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/"$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null)
+        [ "$AHEAD" -gt 0 ] && echo "${YELLOW}本地领先远程 $AHEAD 个提交（需要 push）${NC}"
+        [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ] && echo "${YELLOW}本地落后远程 $BEHIND 个提交（需要 pull）${NC}"
+    fi
+}
+
+# ====== 入口 ======
+case "${1:-status}" in
+    init)     action_init ;;
+    push)     action_push ;;
+    pull)
+        if [ "$2" = "--force-overwrite" ]; then
+            action_force_pull
+        else
+            action_pull
+        fi
+        ;;
+    status)   action_status ;;
+    *)
+        echo "用法: $0 [init|push|pull|status]"
+        echo ""
+        echo "命令:"
+        echo "  init    首次使用，初始化仓库（只需要执行一次）"
+        echo "  push    把当前电脑的更改推送到 GitHub"
+        echo "  pull    从 GitHub 拉取最新内容到当前电脑"
+        echo "  status  查看同步状态"
+        exit 1
+        ;;
+esac

Index: /Users/zengx/WorkBuddy/2026-07-22-13-04-37/.workbuddy/memory/2026-07-23.md
===================================================================
--- /Users/zengx/WorkBuddy/2026-07-22-13-04-37/.workbuddy/memory/2026-07-23.md
+++ /Users/zengx/WorkBuddy/2026-07-22-13-04-37/.workbuddy/memory/2026-07-23.md
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+# 2026-07-23
+
+## WorkBuddy 跨设备同步
+
+用户在多台设备（公司/家里）使用 WorkBuddy，遇到对话历史不跨设备同步的问题。
+WorkBuddy 只同步账号配置，对话记录、记忆文件、Skills、MCP 配置等都存在本地 `~/.workbuddy/`，不自动同步。
+
+为用户写了一个一键同步脚本：`~/.workbuddy/wb-sync.sh`
+- 用法：`wb-sync [init|push|pull|status]`
+- 原理：`~/.workbuddy/` 目录用 Git 管理 → 推送到 GitHub 私有仓库 → 另一台电脑 pull
+- 已在 `~/.zshrc` 添加 alias `wb-sync`
+- 已添加 `.gitignore`，排除 `app/`、`binaries/`、`logs/`、`traces/`、`shell-snapshots/`、WAL 文件、市场缓存、临时文件等
+
+### 已完成配置（公司电脑）
+- GitHub 账号：zengx
+- 仓库：https://github.com/zengx/WorkBuddy （私有）
+- 认证：SSH Key（ed25519，公钥已添加到 GitHub）
+- Git 身份：zengx <zengx@users.noreply.github.com>
+- ✅ 首次推送：6745 个对象，16.57 MiB，main 分支
+
+### 待完成（家里电脑）
+1. 安装 WorkBuddy 并登录同账号
+2. 生成 SSH Key 并添加到 GitHub
+3. 把 `wb-sync.sh` 脚本和 alias 同步过去（可以从 GitHub 仓库或直接复制）
+4. 运行 `wb-sync pull` 拉取配置
+5. 日常：`wb-sync push` / `wb-sync pull`
+
+### 自动化已配置（macOS launchd）
+配置了 `~/Library/LaunchAgents/` 下两个 launchd 任务，做到全自动：
+- `com.zengx.wbsync.pull.plist` - 登录/启动时自动拉取（sleep 30 后执行）
+- `com.zengx.wbsync.push.plist` - 每 5 分钟检查一次，WorkBuddy 不在时自动推送
+
+脚本改造：检测 `WB_SYNC_AUTO=1` 环境变量或非 TTY 时跳过确认提示
+日志位置：`/tmp/wbsync-pull.log`、`/tmp/wbsync-push.log`
+
+管理命令：
+- 停止：launchctl bootout gui/$UID ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.zengx.wbsync.push.plist
+- 启动：launchctl bootstrap gui/$UID ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.zengx.wbsync.push.plist
+- 立即执行 push：launchctl kickstart -k gui/$UID/com.zengx.wbsync.push
+
+### 注意事项
+- 两台电脑 macOS 用户名不同时，可能需要在 WorkBuddy 里重新指定工作目录
+- 切换电脑前要先 Cmd+Q 退出 WorkBuddy，再 push/pull
+- 不要两台同时 push，避免冲突
+- 家里电脑也配同样的 launchd 任务（脚本可从 GitHub 拉取）

Index: /Users/zengx/Library/LaunchAgents/com.zengx.wbsync.pull.plist
===================================================================
--- /Users/zengx/Library/LaunchAgents/com.zengx.wbsync.pull.plist
+++ /Users/zengx/Library/LaunchAgents/com.zengx.wbsync.pull.plist
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
+<plist version="1.0">
+<dict>
+    <key>Label</key>
+    <string>com.zengx.wbsync.pull</string>
+
+    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
+    <array>
+        <string>/bin/zsh</string>
+        <string>-c</string>
+        <string>sleep 30 && WB_SYNC_AUTO=1 /Users/zengx/.workbuddy/wb-sync.sh pull</string>
+    </array>
+
+    <key>RunAtLoad</key>
+    <true/>
+
+    <key>StandardOutPath</key>
+    <string>/tmp/wbsync-pull.log</string>
+
+    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
+    <string>/tmp/wbsync-pull.err</string>
+</dict>
+</plist>

Index: /Users/zengx/Library/LaunchAgents/com.zengx.wbsync.push.plist
===================================================================
--- /Users/zengx/Library/LaunchAgents/com.zengx.wbsync.push.plist
+++ /Users/zengx/Library/LaunchAgents/com.zengx.wbsync.push.plist
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
+<plist version="1.0">
+<dict>
+    <key>Label</key>
+    <string>com.zengx.wbsync.push</string>
+
+    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
+    <array>
+        <string>/bin/zsh</string>
+        <string>-c</string>
+        <string>WB_SYNC_AUTO=1 /Users/zengx/.workbuddy/wb-sync.sh push</string>
+    </array>
+
+    <key>StartInterval</key>
+    <integer>300</integer>
+
+    <key>StandardOutPath</key>
+    <string>/tmp/wbsync-push.log</string>
+
+    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
+    <string>/tmp/wbsync-push.err</string>
+</dict>
+</plist>
